name: Focaccia (from My Garden)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon chopped herbs: rosemary, basil, oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Combine the chopped onion and diced tomato with the chopped herbs into the pizza dough.
3. Gently mix together all ingredients until well combined.
4. Roll the mixture out flat on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
5. Bake for 12 minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.
6. Brush the top of the focaccia with melted butter a few minutes before removing it from the oven.
7. Serve.
